steps.description: Click the "Declarative Agent" option in the dropdown under the "New Project" dialog.
Click the "No Action" entry in the dropdown menu under the "Add an action to your declarative agent" header, located within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface in Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Default folder" dropdown in the "Workspace Folder" dialog to set the project root folder path (`/home/.vscode/AgentsToolkitProjects`).
Press "Ctrl+Shift+P" in the Visual Studio Code interface to open the Command Palette, with the workspace "VSCAUSE_APP_M4X9Y" loaded and the Explorer sidebar visible.
Type text: 'select and start debugging' into the Visual Studio Code command palette input box at the top of the interface.
Click the "Debug: Select and Start Debugging" entry in the Visual Studio Code command palette, located within the search dropdown after entering ">select and start debugging".
@assertion "Preview Local in Copilot (Edge)" and "Preview Local in Copilot (Chrome)" and "Preview in Copilot (Edge)" and "Preview in Copilot (Chrome)" exist.
